mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vocab_cards (user_id, category, term, meaning, example, example_translation, pronunciation, difficulty_level, mastery, next_review_date, tags) VALUES (#{userId}, #{category}, #{term}, #{meaning}, #{example}, #{exampleTranslation}, #{pronunciation}, #{difficultyLevel}, #{mastery}, CURRENT_DATE, CAST(#{tags} AS jsonb))
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, category, term, meaning, example, example_translation, pronunciation, difficulty_level, mastery, next_review_date, tags::text, created_at, ease_factor, interval_days, repetitions, lapses FROM vocab_cards WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, user_id, category, term, meaning, example, example_translation, pronunciation, difficulty_level, mastery, next_review_date, tags::text, created_at, ease_factor, interval_days, repetitions, lapses FROM vocab_cards WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND next_review_date <= CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY next_review_date ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE vocab_cards SET mastery = #{mastery}, next_review_date = #{nextReviewDate}, ease_factor = #{easeFactor}, interval_days = #{intervalDays}, repetitions = #{repetitions}, lapses = #{lapses}, last_reviewed_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
